Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "DAMSELINDISTRESS-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Damsel in Distress.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $4001. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers, so the execution can start at the point the loader has finished and start the game. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
The BASIC program has also been modified to allow control via joystick port 2 as well as keys (both the title screen and instructions captured in the .OCP file have been updated to reflect this).
Note: to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $A7AE after entering the RUN command when the first part of the game has loaded.
